title: Germany vs Ecuador - Post-match
summary: A genuine shock — Ecuador came from behind to beat Germany 2-1 and reach the knockouts for the first time since 2006.

title: Brazil vs Japan - Post-match
summary: Brazil advance to face the winner of Norway vs Ivory Coast in the Round of 16. Japan's historic World Cup run ends in Houston, narrowly denied one of the great upsets.

title: Germany vs Paraguay - Post-match
summary: Paraguay advance to face the winner of France vs Sweden. Germany's 2026 World Cup ends here - their earliest exit since 2018, and arguably the most painful in their entire tournament history.
